# Ramlatech

> Boutique software agency rooted in Ramla, Palestine — delivering web, mobile, and AI-powered solutions to clients across the Levant, GCC, USA, and Canada.

Ramlatech is a Palestinian software house founded under ACT Plus Digital Solutions. We build custom software products with a focus on quality, speed, and long-term partnerships. Our team serves clients in Palestine, Jordan, Iraq, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman, the United States, and Canada.

## Services

- Custom Web Development (React, Next.js, Node.js, PHP)
- Mobile App Development (iOS, Android, React Native)
- AI & Automation (chatbots, workflow automation, LLM integrations)
- Cybersecurity (audits, penetration testing, secure architecture)
- UI/UX Design (product design, design systems, prototyping)
- Digital Transformation consulting

## Pages

- [Home](https://ramlatech.com/): Overview, services summary, client logos, and call to action
- [About](https://ramlatech.com/about.html): Our story, mission, values, and team
- [Services](https://ramlatech.com/services.html): Full service catalog with details
- [Blog](https://ramlatech.com/blog.html): Practical guides on software, AI, and product development
- [Contact](https://ramlatech.com/contact.html): Get in touch or request a quote
